input_roles.edit_target_image: Locks clothing, pose, composition, background and camera relationship.
input_roles.identity_reference_image: Provides facial features, hair, skin tone, age temperament and identity.

change_scope: replace face, hair, skin texture, age temperament and identity with identity_reference_image
critical_requirements: The replaced identity must naturally fit the target clothing, pose, lighting and scene.
Target clothing, fabric, color, decorative details, pose, background and composition must not change.
negative_constraints: do not change target clothing, pose, background, camera or props
do not change age, gender or makeup unless requested
no facial edge, skin tone or lighting mismatch

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Preserve clothing, pose, composition, background, camera and lighting from edit_target_image; replace only the face/hair/identity with identity_reference_image. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.

review_focus: natural skin tone and lighting integration
